name: Sin Devil Trigger Dragon
description:
This is where Dante is a dragon, but it's his Sin Devil Trigger form as a dragon. Also Nero and Vergil is in this.

Basically you are on a hiking trip and can live in the woods lol.

Artwork made by Dragoona on Reddit
